requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Suppression — NFPA 855 or IEC 62933 Fire Provisions; No Djibouti National Fire Code for BESS; Extreme Heat Derating Required
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防抑制——NFPA 855或IEC 62933消防规定；吉布提无BESS国家消防规范；须进行极端高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防抑制——NFPA 855或IEC 62933消防規定；吉布地無BESS國家消防規範；須進行極端高溫降額

summary.en: Djibouti has no confirmed national fire code specifically governing stationary BESS installations. There is no Djibouti-specific equivalent of Qatar's QCDD system, no published national fire safety installation standard for BESS, and no local fire-safety certification body. The applicable international framework is NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) and/or IEC 62933-5-2 fire-safety provisions, which are the internationally expected references for BESS fire protection design in markets without their own BESS fire installation code. NFPA 855 formal adoption by Djibouti authorities has not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. Project owners and financiers will reference NFPA 855 or IEC 62933 fire provisions in project specifications. A critical site-specific factor for Djibouti is extreme desert heat: ambient temperatures regularly exceed 45°C in summer. This significantly increases the risk of thermal runaway in lithium BESS systems — battery thermal management systems (BTMS) must be designed for Djibouti's extreme climate, and IEC 62619 ambient temperature requirements must be applied strictly. Derating of BESS capacity is expected at sustained high ambient temperatures. Ministry of Energy project approval is required for utility-scale installations and should encompass fire-safety design.
summary.zh: 吉布提没有专门针对固定式BESS装置的经确认国家消防规范。吉布提没有类似卡塔尔QCDD体系的等效机制，没有已公布的BESS国家消防安全安装标准，也没有本地消防安全认证机构。适用的国际框架为NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）和/或IEC 62933-5-2消防安全规定，这是没有本国BESS消防安装规范的市场中BESS消防保护设计的国际预期参考标准。截至本数据集日期，吉布提主管机关正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从官方来源得到确认。项目业主和融资方将在项目规格中引用NFPA 855或IEC 62933消防规定。吉布提的一个关键场地特定因素是极端沙漠高温：夏季环境温度经常超过45°C。这显著增加了锂BESS系统热失控的风险——电池热管理系统（BTMS）须针对吉布提的极端气候进行设计，且须严格执行IEC 62619环境温度要求。在持续高环境温度下须对BESS容量进行降额。公用事业规模装置须取得能源部项目批准，且应涵盖消防安全设计。
summary.zht: 吉布地沒有專門針對固定式BESS裝置的經確認國家消防規範。吉布地沒有類似卡達QCDD體系的等效機制，沒有已公布的BESS國家消防安全安裝標準，也沒有本地消防安全認證機構。適用的國際框架為NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）和/或IEC 62933-5-2消防安全規定，這是沒有本國BESS消防安裝規範的市場中BESS消防保護設計的國際預期參考標準。截至本數據集日期，吉布地主管機關正式採納NFPA 855尚未從官方來源得到確認。項目業主和融資方將在項目規格中引用NFPA 855或IEC 62933消防規定。吉布地的一個關鍵場地特定因素是極端沙漠高溫：夏季環境溫度經常超過45°C。這顯著增加了鋰BESS系統熱失控的風險——電池熱管理系統（BTMS）須針對吉布地的極端氣候進行設計，且須嚴格執行IEC 62619環境溫度要求。在持續高環境溫度下須對BESS容量進行降額。公用事業規模裝置須取得能源部項目批准，且應涵蓋消防安全設計。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally expected BESS fire-installation code; Djibouti formal adoption unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Ministry of Energy and project authority)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for Grid-integrated Electrochemical-based Systems (fire-safety provisions applicable where NFPA 855 is not formally adopted)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (ambient temperature requirements — must be applied strictly for Djibouti's extreme heat conditions)
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project-level approval required; no published national BESS fire-installation standard confirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through GB 44240-2024 (which includes fire-safety provisions for cells and modules), GB/T 36558-2023 (system-level safety including fire requirements), and project-level fire-safety review by local fire authorities. China's domestic fire-safety framework for BESS does not reference NFPA 855 — China uses its own GB standard framework. BESS fire-safety design documentation prepared under Chinese standards is not accepted as equivalent to NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2 fire provisions in Djibouti project specifications or Ministry of Energy approvals. Chinese BESS products are typically designed and tested for China's temperate and continental climate zones — additional thermal management design review is needed to validate performance in Djibouti's extreme desert heat (sustained ambient temperatures exceeding 45°C).
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 44240-2024（包含电芯和模组消防安全规定）、GB/T 36558-2023（包含消防要求的系统级安全）以及地方消防主管机关的项目级消防审查管理BESS消防安全。中国国内BESS消防安全框架不引用NFPA 855——中国使用自身的GB标准框架。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全设计文件不被接受为吉布提项目规格或能源部审批中NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防规定的等效依据。中国BESS产品通常针对中国温带和大陆性气候区进行设计和测试——须进行额外的热管理设计审查，以验证在吉布提极端沙漠高温（持续环境温度超过45°C）下的性能。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 44240-2024（包含電芯和模組消防安全規定）、GB/T 36558-2023（包含消防要求的系統級安全）以及地方消防主管機關的項目級消防審查管理BESS消防安全。中國國內BESS消防安全框架不引用NFPA 855——中國使用自身的GB標準框架。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全設計文件不被接受為吉布地項目規格或能源部審批中NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防規定的等效依據。中國BESS產品通常針對中國溫帶和大陸性氣候區進行設計和測試——須進行額外的熱管理設計審查，以驗證在吉布地極端沙漠高溫（持續環境溫度超過45°C）下的性能。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions; mandatory from August 1, 2025; not accepted in Djibouti as substitute for NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level safety including fire requirements; not accepted in Djibouti)

gap.en: Gap: Djibouti has no published national fire code for BESS and no local fire-safety certification body. Chinese GB fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2 fire provisions expected in Djibouti project specifications. A critical site-specific gap is extreme heat: Djibouti ambient temperatures regularly exceed 45°C, significantly elevating thermal runaway risk for lithium-ion BESS. Actions: (a) confirm directly with the Ministry of Energy whether NFPA 855 is required for Djibouti BESS installations or whether IEC 62933-5-2 fire provisions are the applicable reference; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown, and separation distances; (c) conduct BTMS thermal analysis specifically for Djibouti's extreme climate — sustained ambient temperature of 45°C or above; apply IEC 62619 ambient temperature requirements strictly and document derating assumptions; (d) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by internationally recognised third-party bodies (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, SGS); (e) no local fire protection engineer licensing system has been confirmed in Djibouti — engage qualified international fire protection engineers for design review.
gap.zh: 差距：吉布提没有已公布的BESS国家消防规范，也没有本地消防安全认证机构。中国GB消防安全文件不满足吉布提项目规格中预期的NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防规定。一个关键的场地特定差距是极端高温：吉布提环境温度经常超过45°C，显著提升了锂离子BESS热失控风险。行动：（a）直接向能源部确认吉布提BESS装置是否要求NFPA 855，或者IEC 62933-5-2消防规定是否为适用参考；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件，包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测、通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机及隔离距离；（c）专门针对吉布提极端气候进行BTMS热分析——持续环境温度45°C或以上；严格执行IEC 62619环境温度要求并记录降额假设；（d）确保消防抑制系统设备经国际知名第三方机构（UL、FM Global、必维、DNV、SGS）认证；（e）吉布提尚未确认有本地消防工程师执照体系——请聘请合资格的国际消防工程师进行设计审查。
gap.zht: 差距：吉布地沒有已公布的BESS國家消防規範，也沒有本地消防安全認證機構。中國GB消防安全文件不滿足吉布地項目規格中預期的NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防規定。一個關鍵的場地特定差距是極端高溫：吉布地環境溫度經常超過45°C，顯著提升了鋰離子BESS熱失控風險。行動：（a）直接向能源部確認吉布地BESS裝置是否要求NFPA 855，或者IEC 62933-5-2消防規定是否為適用參考；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件，包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測、通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機及隔離距離；（c）專門針對吉布地極端氣候進行BTMS熱分析——持續環境溫度45°C或以上；嚴格執行IEC 62619環境溫度要求並記錄降額假設；（d）確保消防抑制系統設備經國際知名第三方機構（UL、FM Global、必維、DNV、SGS）認證；（e）吉布地尚未確認有本地消防工程師執照體系——請聘請合資格的國際消防工程師進行設計審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — Ministry of Energy project approval expected to encompass fire-safety design; NFPA 855 formal adoption for BESS in Djibouti has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Ministry of Energy; no local fire-safety certification body available
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific under Chinese fire authority approval procedures; not transferable to Djibouti

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti has no published national fire code for BESS and no local fire-safety certification body. Chinese GB fire-safety documentation is not accepted as equivalent to NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2 fire provisions expected in Djibouti project specifications. A critical site-specific risk is Djibouti's extreme desert heat (ambient temperatures regularly exceeding 45°C), which significantly elevates thermal runaway risk in lithium BESS and requires BTMS design specifically validated for the local climate with documented derating assumptions. Confirm applicable fire code with the Ministry of Energy directly and engage qualified international fire protection engineers before system design is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提没有已公布的BESS国家消防规范，也没有本地消防安全认证机构。中国GB消防安全文件不被接受为吉布提项目规格中预期的NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防规定的等效依据。一个关键的场地特定风险是吉布提的极端沙漠高温（环境温度经常超过45°C），显著提升了锂BESS热失控风险，须针对当地气候专门验证BTMS设计并记录降额假设。在系统设计最终确定前，请直接向能源部确认适用消防规范，并聘请合资格的国际消防工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地沒有已公布的BESS國家消防規範，也沒有本地消防安全認證機構。中國GB消防安全文件不被接受為吉布地項目規格中預期的NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2消防規定的等效依據。一個關鍵的場地特定風險是吉布地的極端沙漠高溫（環境溫度經常超過45°C），顯著提升了鋰BESS熱失控風險，須針對當地氣候專門驗證BTMS設計並記錄降額假設。在系統設計最終確定前，請直接向能源部確認適用消防規範，並聘請合資格的國際消防工程師。

requirement_topic.en: BESS Thermal Management — Extreme Desert Heat Derating; IEC 62619 Ambient Temperature Requirements in Djibouti Climate
requirement_topic.zh: BESS热管理——极端沙漠高温降额；IEC 62619环境温度要求在吉布提气候条件下的应用
requirement_topic.zht: BESS熱管理——極端沙漠高溫降額；IEC 62619環境溫度要求在吉布地氣候條件下的應用

summary.en: Djibouti has no specific national standard for BESS thermal management in extreme heat conditions. However, the site conditions in Djibouti impose requirements that go beyond the default operating temperature ranges in Chinese BESS product specifications. Djibouti's climate is classified as hot desert (Köppen BWh): summer ambient temperatures in Djibouti City regularly reach 40–45°C during the day and can exceed 45°C during heat events; the Arta and Dikhil interior regions experience even higher temperatures. Lithium-ion BESS systems operating at sustained high ambient temperatures face accelerated degradation, reduced effective capacity (derating), and significantly elevated thermal runaway risk. IEC 62619:2022 requires cells to be tested across a defined ambient temperature range; project specifications in Djibouti must reference the maximum ambient design temperature, and BTMS sizing must be validated for the local climate extremes. No Djibouti-specific standard supersedes IEC 62619 — the international standard must be applied with site-specific climate data. Ministry of Energy project approval and EDD acceptance should both confirm thermal management design adequacy.
summary.zh: 吉布提没有专门针对极端高温条件下BESS热管理的国家标准。然而，吉布提的场地条件对超出中国BESS产品规格默认运行温度范围的要求。吉布提气候属于热带沙漠气候（科本气候分类BWh）：吉布提市夏季白天环境温度经常达到40–45°C，极端热事件时可超过45°C；阿尔塔和迪基勒内陆地区温度更高。在持续高环境温度下运行的锂离子BESS系统面临加速降解、有效容量降低（降额）以及显著升高的热失控风险。IEC 62619:2022要求在规定的环境温度范围内对电芯进行测试；吉布提的项目规格须引用最高环境设计温度，且BTMS尺寸须针对当地极端气候进行验证。吉布提没有取代IEC 62619的本地标准——须使用场地特定气候数据应用该国际标准。能源部项目批准和EDD认可均应确认热管理设计的充分性。
summary.zht: 吉布地沒有專門針對極端高溫條件下BESS熱管理的國家標準。然而，吉布地的場地條件對超出中國BESS產品規格默認運行溫度範圍的要求。吉布地氣候屬於熱帶沙漠氣候（科本氣候分類BWh）：吉布地市夏季白天環境溫度經常達到40–45°C，極端熱事件時可超過45°C；阿爾塔和迪基勒內陸地區溫度更高。在持續高環境溫度下運行的鋰離子BESS系統面臨加速降解、有效容量降低（降額）以及顯著升高的熱失控風險。IEC 62619:2022要求在規定的環境溫度範圍內對電芯進行測試；吉布地的項目規格須引用最高環境設計溫度，且BTMS尺寸須針對當地極端氣候進行驗證。吉布地沒有取代IEC 62619的本地標準——須使用場地特定氣候數據應用該國際標準。能源部項目批准和EDD認可均應確認熱管理設計的充分性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (ambient temperature testing and requirements — must be applied using Djibouti site-specific climate data)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements (system-level thermal safety provisions applicable in Djibouti)
Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project-level approval; thermal management design adequacy should be confirmed as part of project approval
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — utility acceptance; grid-connected BESS thermal management impacts grid stability and must be addressed in connection agreement

summary.en: Chinese BESS products are designed and tested under GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 44240-2024 for operating temperature ranges typically specified for China's climate zones (standard ambient testing at 25°C, high-temperature testing at 45°C in some specifications). China's standard operating temperature assumptions may not fully capture Djibouti's sustained extreme heat environment where ambient temperatures can exceed 45°C during summer for extended periods. Chinese BTMS designs optimised for China's climate may require additional capacity, redundancy, or technology adaptation (e.g., liquid cooling rather than air cooling) to maintain safe and effective operation at Djibouti temperatures. GB/T 36276-2023 thermal performance requirements and GB 44240-2024 thermal runaway provisions apply in China but carry no equivalence or acceptance in Djibouti — IEC 62619 is the applicable international reference.
summary.zh: 中国BESS产品依据GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024进行设计和测试，运行温度范围通常按中国气候区规格设定（标准环境测试25°C，部分规格高温测试45°C）。中国标准运行温度假设可能无法完全涵盖吉布提持续极端高温环境，该地区夏季环境温度可在较长时间内超过45°C。针对中国气候优化的中国BTMS设计可能需要增加容量、冗余度或技术适应（如液冷而非风冷），以在吉布提温度条件下维持安全有效运行。GB/T 36276-2023热性能要求和GB 44240-2024热失控规定在中国适用，但在吉布提没有等效性或认可——IEC 62619是适用的国际参考标准。
summary.zht: 中國BESS產品依據GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024進行設計和測試，運行溫度範圍通常按中國氣候區規格設定（標準環境測試25°C，部分規格高溫測試45°C）。中國標準運行溫度假設可能無法完全涵蓋吉布地持續極端高溫環境，該地區夏季環境溫度可在較長時間內超過45°C。針對中國氣候優化的中國BTMS設計可能需要增加容量、冗余度或技術適應（如液冷而非風冷），以在吉布地溫度條件下維持安全有效運行。GB/T 36276-2023熱性能要求和GB 44240-2024熱失控規定在中國適用，但在吉布地沒有等效性或認可——IEC 62619是適用的國際參考標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (thermal runaway provisions; mandatory from August 1, 2025; not accepted in Djibouti)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (thermal performance requirements; not accepted in Djibouti)

gap.en: Gap: No Djibouti-specific BESS thermal management standard exists; IEC 62619 is the applicable international reference and must be applied using Djibouti site-specific climate data. Chinese BESS products designed for China's climate zones may not be validated for sustained operation at Djibouti's ambient temperatures (regularly 40–45°C, peaks exceeding 45°C). Actions: (a) obtain and document site-specific climate data for the BESS installation location in Djibouti — maximum ambient temperature, duration of temperature exceedance, solar irradiance on enclosure surfaces, minimum night temperature; (b) validate IEC 62619 ambient temperature compliance using Djibouti site data, not just standard test conditions; (c) size BTMS (battery thermal management system) for the most demanding Djibouti climate scenario — liquid cooling is recommended for sustained high-temperature environments; (d) document capacity derating assumptions at the maximum design ambient temperature and confirm these are acceptable to the project owner and EDD; (e) confirm thermal management design review is included in Ministry of Energy project approval scope.
gap.zh: 差距：吉布提没有BESS热管理的本地标准；IEC 62619是适用的国际参考标准，须使用吉布提场地特定气候数据应用。针对中国气候区设计的中国BESS产品可能未经验证能够在吉布提环境温度（通常40–45°C，峰值超过45°C）下持续运行。行动：（a）获取并记录吉布提BESS安装地点的场地特定气候数据——最高环境温度、温度超标持续时间、机箱表面太阳辐照度、最低夜间温度；（b）使用吉布提场地数据而非仅依据标准测试条件验证IEC 62619环境温度合规性；（c）按吉布提最严苛气候场景确定BTMS（电池热管理系统）规格——持续高温环境建议采用液冷；（d）记录在最高设计环境温度下的容量降额假设，并确认项目业主和EDD可接受；（e）确认热管理设计审查已纳入能源部项目审批范围。
gap.zht: 差距：吉布地沒有BESS熱管理的本地標準；IEC 62619是適用的國際參考標準，須使用吉布地場地特定氣候數據應用。針對中國氣候區設計的中國BESS產品可能未經驗證能夠在吉布地環境溫度（通常40–45°C，峰值超過45°C）下持續運行。行動：（a）獲取並記錄吉布地BESS安裝地點的場地特定氣候數據——最高環境溫度、溫度超標持續時間、機箱表面太陽輻照度、最低夜間溫度；（b）使用吉布地場地數據而非僅依據標準測試條件驗證IEC 62619環境溫度合規性；（c）按吉布地最嚴苛氣候場景確定BTMS（電池熱管理系統）規格——持續高溫環境建議採用液冷；（d）記錄在最高設計環境溫度下的容量降額假設，並確認項目業主和EDD可接受；（e）確認熱管理設計審查已納入能源部項目審批範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — IEC 62619 ambient temperature requirements apply to all BESS in Djibouti; no Djibouti-specific thermal management standard; Ministry of Energy project approval and EDD acceptance should confirm BTMS design adequacy for Djibouti's extreme climate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 44240-2024 thermal provisions for Chinese BESS; not transferable to Djibouti; Chinese climate zone assumptions may not be adequate for Djibouti's extreme heat

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti has no specific BESS thermal management standard; IEC 62619 applies and must be validated using Djibouti site-specific climate data (ambient temperatures regularly 40–45°C, peaks exceeding 45°C). Chinese BESS products designed for China's climate zones must have their BTMS designs revalidated for Djibouti's extreme desert heat. Capacity derating at high ambient temperatures is expected and must be documented and accepted by the project owner and EDD. Engage a thermal engineering specialist to validate BTMS performance under Djibouti climate conditions before equipment specification is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提没有专项BESS热管理标准；IEC 62619适用，须使用吉布提场地特定气候数据（环境温度通常40–45°C，峰值超过45°C）进行验证。针对中国气候区设计的中国BESS产品须重新验证BTMS设计以适应吉布提极端沙漠高温。预计在高环境温度下须进行容量降额，且须记录并获得项目业主和EDD的接受。请在设备规格最终确定前聘请热工程专家验证BTMS在吉布提气候条件下的性能。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地沒有專項BESS熱管理標準；IEC 62619適用，須使用吉布地場地特定氣候數據（環境溫度通常40–45°C，峰值超過45°C）進行驗證。針對中國氣候區設計的中國BESS產品須重新驗證BTMS設計以適應吉布地極端沙漠高溫。預計在高環境溫度下須進行容量降額，且須記錄並獲得項目業主和EDD的接受。請在設備規格最終確定前聘請熱工程專家驗證BTMS在吉布地氣候條件下的性能。
